ddls:
CREATE TABLE "expense_types" (
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense type */,
  "expense_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense type */,
  "expense_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the expense type (e.g., fee, expense) */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the expense type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_types" (
  "etf_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETF type */,
  "etf_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ETF type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ETF type */,
  "etf_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the ETF type (e.g., equity, fixed income) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the ETF type (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etf_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense record */,
  "etf_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF type the expense belongs to */,
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the expense as a percentage */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the expense becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the expense expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_etf_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_type_id") REFERENCES etf_types ("etf_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_expense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_type_id") REFERENCES expense_types ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_expenses" (
  "etf_expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETF expense record */,
  "etf_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF type the expense belongs to */,
  "management_fee" REAL /* Management fee as a percentage */,
  "other_expenses" REAL /* Other expenses as a percentage */,
  "total_expense" REAL /* Total expense as a percentage */,
  "fee_waiver" REAL /* Fee waiver as a percentage */,
  "net_expense" REAL /* Net expense as a percentage */,
  "gross_expense" REAL /* Gross expense as a percentage */,
  "expense_ratio" REAL /* Expense ratio (total expense / net assets) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etf_expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_expenses_etf_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_type_id") REFERENCES etf_types ("etf_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_historical_expenses" (
  "etf_historical_expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical ETF expense record */,
  "etf_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF type the expense belongs to */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date of the expense data */,
  "management_fee" REAL /* Management fee as a percentage */,
  "other_expenses" REAL /* Other expenses as a percentage */,
  "total_expense" REAL /* Total expense as a percentage */,
  "fee_waiver" REAL /* Fee waiver as a percentage */,
  "net_expense" REAL /* Net expense as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etf_historical_expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_historical_expenses_etf_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_type_id") REFERENCES etf_types ("etf_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, portfolio manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., finance, investment) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "etf_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF type being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Details of the access (e.g., filters applied, data exported) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_etf_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_type_id") REFERENCES etf_types ("etf_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "etf_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF type the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes describing the changes made in the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version (e.g., user who made the changes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_etf_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_type_id") REFERENCES etf_types ("etf_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail record */,
  "etf_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF type the change belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_etf_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_type_id") REFERENCES etf_types ("etf_type_id")
)
